brand.name: Fatima Multispeciality Hospital
brand.tagline: Aapki Sehat. Aapka Parivaar. Hamara Vaada.
brand.positioning: Premium Healthcare, Sanctuary of Healing, 20+ Years Excellence

headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937]

surfaces_and_shadows.button_primary: bg-[#0D8B6F] text-white hover:bg-[#0A6B56] shadow-md rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors
surfaces_and_shadows.button_accent: bg-[#B88A28] text-white hover:bg-[#9A7320] shadow-md rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors
surfaces_and_shadows.button_emergency: bg-[#E63946] text-white hover:bg-[#C1121F] shadow-lg shadow-red-500/30 rounded-full px-8 py-3 animate-pulse

components.navigation: Sticky header (Crystal Glassmorphism) with Logo, Links, and 'Book Appointment' Primary Button.
components.floating_actions: Fixed bottom-right WhatsApp icon (Green), fixed bottom-left Emergency Contact (Red #E63946).
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Input fields with rounded-xl, #0D8B6F focus rings, light grey borders.
components.marquee: Slow, organic editorial ribbon displaying '24x7 Emergency • Advanced NICU • 14,000+ Deliveries • In-House Pharmacy' using Poppins text-sm uppercase with #0D8B6F text on #F8FAFB background.
components.hero: Split layout or soft-rounded massive image container. Overlay opacity max 30% if text is over image. High-end sanctuary feel.
components.admin_panel: Dense dashboard using #F8FAFB bg, white cards, strictly geometric (Inter body) for data legibility. Shadcn tables.

images.description: Premium hospital room with advanced bed.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY for all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs, menus, CTAs). Format: kebab-case, role-based.
testing_and_accessibility.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Use focus rings on interactive elements. Alt attributes for all images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Generate pages for: Home, About, Departments, Maternity, Facilities, Doctors, Gallery, Blog, Contact.
Include a secure Admin Panel with login, appointment management, doctor lists, blog management, and lead tracking.
Implement an Online Appointment System with lead capture.
Ensure Floating WhatsApp and Emergency Contact triggers are present on user-facing pages.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/home page layouts. Use Shadcn components for forms, modals, inputs, and admin panel, highly customized to match the brand colors and border radii.
Integrate an interactive Google Map iframe in the Contact page.
Apply 'data-testid' to EVERY button, link, and form input.
